hero.headline:
Experts in brickwork,
facade renovation & scaffolding.
hero.subline: For businesses, housing corporations and contractors throughout the Netherlands.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: From brickwork to facade renovation — we offer complete solutions for every construction project.

metselwerk.title: Brickwork
metselwerk.short: Expert brickwork for new builds and renovations.
metselwerk.description: From foundations to facades: we deliver high-quality brickwork for both residential and commercial projects. With attention to detail and durable materials.

gevelrenovatie.title: Facade renovation
gevelrenovatie.short: Restore and modernize your facade professionally.
gevelrenovatie.description: We renovate facades of all types of buildings, from houses to commercial properties. Including cleaning, repairs and coating.

monumentale-restauratie.title: Monument restoration
monumentale-restauratie.description: With craftsmanship and historical awareness, we restore listed buildings to their original state.

isolatie.title: Insulation
isolatie.description: Cavity wall insulation, external facade insulation and roof insulation for a warmer home and lower energy bills.

steigerbouw.title: Scaffolding
steigerbouw.description: We install and manage scaffolding for every type of project, from small renovations to large construction projects.

projects.title: Our projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of our most recent and challenging realizations.

whyus.title: Why MMBS Group?
whyus.subtitle: We distinguish ourselves through craftsmanship, speed and sustainability.

vakmanschap.title: Craftsmanship
vakmanschap.description: More than 20 years of experience in construction. Our specialists are certified and work to the highest quality standards.

snelheid.title: Speed
snelheid.description: We plan efficiently and deliver on time. Your project will never be delayed on our side.

duurzaamheid.title: Sustainability
duurzaamheid.description: We choose sustainable materials and methods, good for the environment and your wallet in the long run.

kwaliteit.title: Quality
kwaliteit.description: Every project goes through a strict quality process. We always deliver what we promise — and more.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: More than 500 satisfied clients speak for themselves.

cta.title: Ready to build together?
cta.subtitle: Request a no-obligation quote today. We respond within 24 hours.

about.title: About MMBS Group
about.subtitle: More than 20 years leading in facade solutions.
about.story: MMBS Group was founded in 2003 in Utrecht with one clear goal: to deliver the highest quality in brickwork and facade solutions. What started as a small team of specialists, grew into one of the most respected players in the Dutch construction sector.
about.mission: We believe in sustainable construction, craftsmanship and personal attention for every client. From small renovations to large-scale restoration projects — MMBS Group guarantees quality and reliability.
about.team_subtitle: More than 100 certified specialists ready for your project.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: We answer your question within 24 hours.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! We will contact you as soon as possible.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.calculator_subtitle: Get an immediate cost estimate for your project.

calculator.price_disclaimer: * This is an indicative price. Actual costs may vary based on a custom quote.
calculator.success: Thank you for your request! We will contact you within 24 hours.

vacatures.title: Work at MMBS Group
vacatures.subtitle: Join our team of more than 100 specialists.
vacatures.no_vacancies: No open vacancies at the moment. Send us an open application.
vacatures.open_application_text: No suitable vacancy? Send us your CV and motivation.

nieuws.title: News & Updates
nieuws.subtitle: The latest news from MMBS Group.

footer.description: Expert in brickwork, facade renovation, monument restoration, insulation and scaffolding. Based in Utrecht, active throughout the Netherlands.

chatbot.title: MMBS Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: How can I help you?
chatbot.welcome: Good day! I am the virtual assistant of MMBS Group. How can I help you with your construction project?

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze our website. By continuing, you agree to our privacy policy.
